component.name: Symbinux
component.summary: Talk to legacy Nokia phones over FBUS/MBUS

description.p: Symbinux communicates with legacy Nokia phones (Series 40/60, BB5) over the FBUS/MBUS serial protocols via USB, and auto-detects a connected phone's platform (Nokia legacy / Android / Apple iOS). It is a modern, clean-room reimplementation inspired by the Nokinux project, with a Rust core and a GTK4/libadwaita interface.
The app owns the connection: it can claim the USB device directly and force a Bluetooth pairing, rather than depending on the operating system's default drivers. It uses no proprietary Nokia code.
